appraisal_events.evidence: « ...tandis que la demoiselle de Robert de Saint-Loup, je vous assure qu'elle est à mourir de rire... Robert de Saint-Loup a peut-être l'ivresse, mais il n'a vraiment pas fait preuve de goût dans le choix du flacon ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchess ridicules Saint-Loup's companion and, more directly, blames Robert's bad taste in his choice. Mr. d’Argencourt's laughter socially reinforces this depreciation.

status_effects.explanation: His discernment is publicly called into question; he locally loses esteem due to the duchess's sharp but severe judgment.
Her quip causes laughter and she gracefully follows it up ('cuddly air'), which consolidates her position as the dominant wit in the exchange.
